title: Robin Appears on the Merry
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on robin boards the merry. Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
scene: This scene belongs to the Robin Boards the Merry sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Narrator.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's wrong? You look panicked, Igaram.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You used to be a pirate yourself...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Marine HO Seaman Recruit "Jango the Double-Crosser"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marine HO Seaman Recruit "Iron First Fullbody"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh yeah! Dance! Dance! Funce! Funky style!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Are the ships all in place yet?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Yes, all preparations are complete, ma'am!

summary: Nico Robin appears aboard the Going Merry and forces the crew to confront the fact that a former enemy now wants to travel with them.
